sizing_rule.note: Position size determined by optimal f calculated from historical win/loss ratios and mean absolute deviation (M = ∑ABS(Xi-X̄)/N). Select the trading system with highest geometric mean at its optimal f level. Optimal f examples: System A = 0.0678, System B = 0.40. Position size = optimal fraction of account determined by this calculation.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be determined using optimal f, calculated from historical win/loss ratios and mean absolute deviation, with system selection based on geometric mean performance at optimal f levels.
